ふふっ、その衣装――やっぱりお似合いね、シャノンさん。: Fufu, that outfit really does suit you, Shannon.
……褒められて悪い気はしないが、酒場の用心棒をするだけなのに<br>わざわざこん:
...I don't mind the compliments, but I don't think I need to dress like
this just to be a bouncer at a bar—
だって物騒なカッコでウロウロされちゃ、お店の雰囲気が台無しでしょ？<br>お客様:
If you wander around looking intimidating, it ruins the place's
atmosphere, doesn't it? Customers couldn't enjoy their drinks.
まぁ、この仕事はルディアさんが依頼人だ。<br>依頼人の指示通りに私は動くよ。:
Well, you're the one who hired me for this gig, Ludia. I'll follow my
client's instructions.
じゃあ、さっそく今夜から頼むわね！<br>行儀の悪い人にはしっかり、お仕置きして:
Then I'm counting on you starting tonight! Give any troublemakers a
proper punishment, Miss Bouncer!♪
何よ、急に。どうかしたの？: What is it, all of a sudden? Something wrong?
いや、その……用心棒ってどういうことだ？<br>まさか……シャノンがここで働くの:
No, I mean... what do you mean 'bouncer'? Don't tell me... Shannon's
working here... as a bouncer?
だから最初からずっと、そう言っていたじゃないか。: I told you that from the very start, didn't I?
ええっ！？ 最初から！？ そ、そうだった……っけ！？<br>お、俺はてっきり、娼:
Huh! From the start! I-Is that right...? I-I was sure she was working as
a courtesan...
まぁっ…！ 試着にずいぶん時間が掛かっていると思っていたけど――<br>まさか司:
Oh my...! I wondered why the fitting was taking so long... Don't tell
me, Commander... did you give Shannon some training?
え？ け、研修！？<br>あ、あれ？ じゃ、じゃあ、さっきのって……: Wh-what? T-training? Oh, oh? Then that earlier was...
正直に言いなさい。研修……しちゃったのね？: Be honest now. You gave her training... didn't you?
（はぁ……さっきのがオーナーの勘違いだったなんて……）: (*sigh*... to think that was all the Owner's misunderstanding...)
（…………でも、まぁ、いいか。<br>オーナーとの初体験……すごく気持ち良かった:
(...But, well, I guess it's fine. My first time with the Owner felt really
good...)
（それに、初めての相手がオーナーで……良かった……）: (...Besides, I'm glad my first partner was the Owner...)
